assertion_results.text: Step 0.3 reads the Last-Updated timestamp from the security-matrix.md HTML comment
assertion_results.evidence: staleness-check.md explicitly extracts the Last-Updated timestamp for both streams: 'Last-Updated timestamp: `2026-06-28T10:00:00Z`' (lines 7 and 17).

assertion_results.text: Step 0.3 determines the matrix is within the 14-day threshold and proceeds without displaying a staleness warning
assertion_results.evidence: staleness-check.md states for both streams: 'Staleness threshold: 14 days' and 'Result: **Within threshold** -- matrix is fresh. No staleness warning displayed.' (lines 9-10 and 19-20). The computed age is 4 days, well within 14 days.

assertion_results.text: No user prompt or options are presented for a fresh matrix — the check is silent on success
assertion_results.evidence: staleness-check.md explicitly states 'No user prompt or options presented. Proceeding silently.' after each stream check (lines 12 and 23), and the summary confirms: 'The staleness check passed silently for all streams with no warnings or user prompts.' (line 27).

assertion_results.text: The triage continues to Step 0.5 and beyond without interruption from the staleness check
assertion_results.evidence: staleness-check.md line 29 states 'Proceeding to Step 0.5 (JIRA Access Initialization) without interruption.' Additionally, data-extraction.md shows Step 1 (Data Extraction) was completed, demonstrating the triage progressed well beyond Step 0.5.
